name: Easy Last-Minute Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Mix all the dry ingredients in a bowl.
3. Blend in the cold coffee, mayonnaise, and vanilla extract until smooth.
4. Grease and flour an 8-inch round cake pan.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake in the preheated oven for 45 minutes.
7. Test to see if it's done by inserting a knife into the middle of the cake. If it comes out clean, the cake is ready.
8. Remove from the oven and cool on a wire rack.
9. Slice and serve.
